name: zsys_read_cmos_rtc_seconds_bcd
description: zSys::ReadCmosRtcSecondsBcd returns a BCD-encoded seconds value. The production source uses GetLocalTime as a safe functional substitute for the original CMOS port read.
known_limits: The original reads CMOS register 0 through ports 0x70/0x71. Production source does not use raw port I/O without an approved raw-assembly exception.
The native smoke verifies that the returned value is a valid BCD seconds byte.
